storyBeat: 三兄弟離家 — 媽媽說:小心狼

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚故事的小幫手來了！
🔑 pig = 豬
🔑 mother = 媽媽
🔑 leave = 離開
🔑 road = 路
記住這 4 個字，等一下聽故事就順多了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Three little pigs grew up in their mother's house.
questions.explanationZh: 三隻小豬從小就住在媽媽溫暖的家裡。一天一天長大，長大，再長大……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One spring day, their mother said it was time to leave.
questions.explanationZh: 春天到了，媽媽拍拍他們說：「你們長大了，該去走自己的路囉。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The brothers hugged her tight. They did not let go.
questions.questionEn: Did the pigs feel sad to leave?
questions.explanationZh: 你看，他們抱得多緊、多捨不得放！那當然是捨不得離開、心裡難過嘛。答案是 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 兄弟三個緊緊抱住媽媽，捨不得放手。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They walked down the road together, side by side.
questions.explanationZh: 三兄弟肩並肩走在路上，一起踏上新的旅程，多溫馨啊。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Each pig would build his own home along this road.
questions.question: What was the plan for each pig?
questions.explanationZh: own home，自己的家——所以每隻小豬的計畫是「蓋自己的房子」。
questions.sentenceZh: 每隻小豬都要沿著這條路，蓋自己的家。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The big bad wolf lived in the woods nearby.
questions.explanationZh: 大野狼就住在附近的樹林裡。黑漆漆的森林，藏著一隻肚子很餓的壞蛋……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He was hungry. He liked to chase small animals near the road.
questions.question: What did the wolf like to do?
questions.explanationZh: chase 就是「追」，small animals 就是「小動物」——大野狼最愛做的事，就是去追小動物！
questions.sentenceZh: 大野狼肚子好餓，最喜歡追路邊的小動物。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Mother said, "Be careful. Build a strong house."
questions.explanationZh: 媽媽說了最重要的一句話：「小心！要蓋一間堅固的家。」這句話，小豬們記住了嗎？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What kind of house did mother ask for?
questions.question: What kind of house?
questions.explanationZh: 媽媽說的是 strong house——堅固的家！不是快、不是甜，是「堅固的」。
questions.sentenceZh: 媽媽要的是什麼樣的家？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the word to its meaning.
questions.explanationZh: 配對練習一下！pig=豬、mother=媽媽、road=路、leave=離開。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Three little pigs grew up and left their mother's house one spring day.
questions.question: What is this story mainly about?
options: three pigs starting their own lives
a wolf who can sing and dance
pigs who found some gold coins
optionsZh: 三隻小豬開始自己的生活
questions.explanationZh: 故事一開頭就說三兄弟從媽媽家出發，要各自蓋房子——主題是「三隻小豬開始自己的生活」！
questions.sentenceZh: 三隻小豬長大後，在一個春天離開了媽媽的家。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Mother gave the pigs one key piece of advice before they left.
questions.questionEn: Did mother want the pigs to build any kind of house?
questions.explanationZh: 媽媽說的是「堅固的」家，不是隨便什麼樣的家——所以她不是說「隨便蓋就好」，答案是 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 媽媽在小豬出發前，給了他們一個重要的叮嚀。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The big bad wolf lived in the woods and was always hungry.
questions.question: Which word describes the wolf?
questions.explanationZh: 「壞」又「餓」——大野狼是危險的角色，而不是善良、搞笑或懶惰的！
questions.sentenceZh: 大野狼住在森林裡，肚子老是餓著。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Each pig would build his own home along this road.
questions.question: Why did the three pigs go different ways?
options: each one wanted his own place
they were angry with each other
questions.explanationZh: 故事說每隻小豬要蓋「自己的」家——所以他們分開走，是因為「每隻都想要自己的家」！
questions.sentenceZh: 每隻小豬都要沿著這條路，蓋自己的家。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the description to the right character.
questions.explanationZh: 故事裡誰做了什麼？mother 給建議、wolf 肚子餓、pigs 離家、wolf 住森林！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They walked down the road together, side by side.
questions.questionEn: Did the three brothers walk alone at first?
questions.explanationZh: side by side 就是「並肩走」——三兄弟一起走，不是一個人，所以答案是 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 三兄弟肩並肩走在路上。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Mother's words hang in the air: build a strong house...
questions.explanationZh: 媽媽的話還飄在空氣裡：「蓋一間堅固的家……」三兄弟，你們聽進去了嗎？

storyBeat: 草屋蓋好 — 風吹草搖

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
這節的生字，來認識一下！
🔑 straw = 草（稻草）
🔑 fast = 快
🔑 wind = 風
🔑 wall = 牆
記住這 4 個，故事更好懂！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The first pig met a man with a cart full of straw.
questions.explanationZh: 第一隻小豬走著走著，遇到一個人，推著一大車黃橙橙的稻草。「就它了！」他心想。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He chose straw because it was light and easy to lift.
questions.questionEn: Did the first pig want a hard job?
questions.explanationZh: 稻草輕又好搬，第一隻小豬就是要省力氣——他可不想做累死人的苦工，答案是 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 他選了稻草，因為又輕又好搬。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He took the straw and built a house in one hour.
questions.explanationZh: 拿了稻草，「嘿嘿嘿」搭一搭，一個小時，家就蓋好了！真的超快的。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He was done before lunch time.
questions.question: How fast did the first pig build?
questions.explanationZh: 午餐前就蓋好——那可真是快呢！答案是「很快」。
questions.sentenceZh: 吃午飯前，他就蓋好了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He sat down to rest and ate his lunch.
questions.explanationZh: 蓋好了就坐下來，吃午飯、曬太陽，美滋滋的。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How did the first pig feel after building?
questions.question: How did he feel?
questions.explanationZh: 蓋完就坐下吃飯——肯定是輕輕鬆鬆、開開心心囉！
questions.sentenceZh: 蓋完房子，第一隻小豬心情怎麼樣？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The wind began to blow across the field.
questions.explanationZh: 這時候，風開始吹過田野。「呼——」輕輕的風，卻帶來了一點不安……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The walls leaned and shook with every soft breeze.
questions.question: How strong were the straw walls?
questions.explanationZh: 小風才一吹，牆就左搖右擺——這稻草屋，真的太「弱又會搖」了！
questions.sentenceZh: 每一陣輕風，牆就搖晃歪斜。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But the first pig only smiled and ate.
questions.explanationZh: 牆在搖，第一隻小豬呢？他只是笑笑，繼續吃，完全不在乎！唉……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the word to its meaning.
questions.explanationZh: 快複習一下這節的生字：straw=稻草、fast=快、wind=風、wall=牆！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He chose straw because it was light and easy to lift. He took the straw and built a house in one hour.
questions.question: What does this tell us about the first pig?
options: wanted the easiest and quickest way
was already scared of the wolf
had no money for better materials
questions.explanationZh: 選輕的稻草、一小時就蓋好——這說明第一隻小豬「想走輕鬆快速的路」，不想多費力氣。
questions.sentenceZh: 他選了稻草，因為輕又好搬；拿了稻草，一個小時就把家蓋好了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The wind began to blow across the field.
questions.questionEn: Was the wind a sign of danger for the straw house?
questions.explanationZh: 牆一碰風就搖——風對草屋當然是危險的警訊，所以答案是 Yes！
questions.sentenceZh: 風開始吹過田野。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The straw walls leaned and shook with every soft breeze.
questions.question: What word fits the straw walls best?
questions.explanationZh: 一陣風就搖——稻草牆是「脆弱的」，fragile 就是這個意思！
questions.sentenceZh: 稻草牆在每一陣輕風中搖晃歪斜。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He _____ down to rest and ate his lunch.
questions.question: Which word fits in the blank?
questions.explanationZh: 故事用的是過去式——「他坐下來」要說 sat，不是 sit 或 sits。記住：sit → sat，過去式！
questions.sentenceZh: 他坐下來休息，吃了午飯。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But the first pig only smiled and ate. The straw walls sway again.
questions.question: What is the problem at the end of this lesson?
options: walls shaking but the pig does nothing
pig cannot find any food to eat
wind has stopped and it is too quiet
pig wants to go back to mother
optionsZh: 牆一直搖，小豬卻不在乎
questions.explanationZh: 牆搖了又搖，小豬卻只是笑著吃飯——問題是「牆一直搖，小豬卻不在乎」，這才是隱患！
questions.sentenceZh: 可是第一隻小豬只是笑笑繼續吃，稻草牆又搖了一下。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the action to who did it.
questions.explanationZh: 這節誰做了什麼？第一隻小豬一小時蓋好房子、笑著吃飯；風吹過田野；稻草牆搖晃！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The straw walls sway again. And again. And again...
questions.explanationZh: 稻草牆又搖了。又搖了。又搖了……風還在吹，小豬還在吃，危險正悄悄靠近。

storyBeat: 木屋蓋好 — 遠處腳步聲

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
繼續認識新生字！
🔑 sticks = 木枝
🔑 second = 第二
🔑 proud = 驕傲
🔑 steps = 腳步
記住這 4 個，後面更好懂！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The second pig met a man with a cart of sticks.
questions.explanationZh: 第二隻小豬走著走著，遇到一個人推著一車木枝。「這個看起來比稻草硬！」他心想。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He picked sticks because they felt firmer than straw.
questions.question: Why did he pick sticks?
options: he had no other choice left
questions.explanationZh: 他覺得木枝比稻草硬——firmer than straw，所以選它！
questions.sentenceZh: 他選了木枝，因為木枝比稻草硬。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He built his house in one afternoon.
questions.explanationZh: 第二隻小豬一整個下午「咚咚咚」地搭，太陽還沒下山就蓋好了，比哥哥慢一點，但他更認真。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He worked all day. He did not stop.
questions.questionEn: Did he take many long breaks?
questions.explanationZh: 一直做、沒有停——這樣當然就沒有「長時間休息」嘍，答案是 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 他做了一整天，完全沒有停下來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He looked at his new home and felt proud.
questions.explanationZh: 看著剛蓋好的家，第二隻小豬挺起胸膛，心裡暖呼呼地驕傲著。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What did the second pig feel?
questions.question: What did he feel?
questions.explanationZh: 看著自己蓋的家，他滿心都是驕傲——proud！
questions.sentenceZh: 第二隻小豬的心情是？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The sun went down behind the trees.
questions.explanationZh: 太陽慢慢沉到樹後面，天空染成了橘紅色。夜晚，要來了……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: From the dark path came a soft sound, slow and heavy.
questions.question: What did the second pig hear?
questions.explanationZh: 從黑暗的路上傳來「咚——咚——」的聲音，又輕又重——那是什麼的腳步聲呢？
questions.sentenceZh: 黑暗的小路上，傳來又輕又沉的聲音，越來越近。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The second pig stood still. He listened.
questions.explanationZh: 第二隻小豬站著不動，豎起耳朵，屏住呼吸，靜靜地聽……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the word to its meaning.
questions.explanationZh: 複習一下！sticks=木枝、second=第二、proud=驕傲、steps=腳步聲。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He picked sticks because they felt firmer than straw. He worked all day. He did not stop.
questions.question: How was the second pig different from the first?
options: worked longer and chose stronger material
was much lazier and built much faster
used the same straw as his brother
asked mother to come and help him
optionsZh: 花更多時間，選了更硬的材料
用了跟哥哥一樣的稻草
questions.explanationZh: 他選了比稻草更硬的木枝，還做了一整天不休息——比第一隻小豬「花更多時間，選了更硬的材料」！
questions.sentenceZh: 他選了比稻草硬的木枝，做了整整一天都沒停下來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: From the dark path came a soft sound, slow and heavy.
questions.questionEn: Was the sound coming closer to the pig?
questions.explanationZh: 從黑暗路上傳來腳步聲——這個聲音越來越近，對第二隻小豬來說當然是越來越靠近，答案是 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 從黑暗的小路上，傳來又輕又沉的聲音。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The second pig stood still and listened carefully.
questions.question: How did the pig feel when he heard the sound?
questions.explanationZh: 站著不動、豎耳靜聽——面對不明腳步聲，小豬是「緊張害怕」的，nervous 就對了！
questions.sentenceZh: 第二隻小豬一動不動，仔細聆聽。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He looked at his new home and felt proud. The sun went down behind the trees.
questions.question: What changed the mood at the end of this lesson?
options: night came and something unknown moved closer
pig started laughing loudly at the moon
pig heard his brothers calling from far away
wind stopped and everything became calm
optionsZh: 夜晚降臨，有什麼不明的東西越來越近
小豬對著月亮大聲笑起來
小豬聽到兄弟從遠處呼喚
風停了，一切都變得平靜
questions.explanationZh: 太陽下山後，黑暗的路上傳來腳步聲——氣氛從開心驕傲，突然轉成「夜晚降臨，有不明東西越來越近」！
questions.sentenceZh: 他看著新蓋好的家，覺得好驕傲。太陽沉到樹後面去了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match these words from the story.
questions.explanationZh: 記好這幾個詞：firmer=更硬、proud=驕傲、still=不動、heavy=沉重。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He built his house in one afternoon.
questions.questionEn: Did the second pig finish faster than the first pig?
questions.explanationZh: 第一隻小豬一小時蓋完，第二隻做了整個下午——所以第二隻比較慢，答案是 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 第二隻小豬在一個下午裡蓋好了他的家。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Heavy steps. Heavy steps. Coming closer down the path...
questions.explanationZh: 「咚——咚——咚——」腳步聲越來越近，越來越近……是誰來了？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚的重要生字，快看！
🔑 brick = 磚
🔑 mud = 泥
🔑 knock = 敲門
🔑 breath = 呼吸
記住這 4 個字，故事裡用得到！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The third pig was still working hard on his house.
questions.explanationZh: 第三隻小豬呢？他還在工地，認認真真地搬磚、砌牆。一塊、一塊、再一塊……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He lifted heavy red blocks and mixed cold wet earth all day.
questions.question: What did the third pig use?
questions.explanationZh: 紅色的磚塊就是 brick（燒過的石塊），濕冷的泥土就是 mud（黏土）——所以他用的是磚頭和黏土！
questions.sentenceZh: 他整天搬著沉沉的紅磚，和著濕冷的泥土。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The other two pigs laughed at him for working so slow.
questions.explanationZh: 兩個哥哥在旁邊笑：「你做這麼慢，真是太磨蹭了！哈哈哈！」第三隻小豬沒有理他們，繼續搬磚。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His walls were tall. His walls were thick.
questions.questionEn: Was his work weak?
questions.explanationZh: 又高又厚的牆，那肯定是很紮實——怎麼可能「薄弱」？答案是 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 他的牆砌得又高又厚。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: That same night, the wolf came to the straw house.
questions.explanationZh: 就在那天晚上，大野狼出現了——他先走向草屋，嘴角帶著壞笑。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Where did the wolf go first?
questions.question: Where did the wolf go first?
questions.explanationZh: 大野狼第一站——草屋！它最軟，最好對付嘛。
questions.sentenceZh: 大野狼第一個去了哪裡？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He knocked on the wooden door three times.
questions.explanationZh: 「咚！咚！咚！」大野狼用爪子敲了木門三下，聲音好大。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His knocks were loud, and his voice was soft like honey.
questions.question: How did the wolf knock and speak?
questions.explanationZh: 敲得「咚！咚！」很大聲，但說話卻甜得像蜂蜜——「大聲敲，聲音甜」就是大野狼的把戲！
questions.sentenceZh: 他敲得很大聲，說話的聲音卻甜得像蜂蜜。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Little pig, little pig, let me come in!" he called.
questions.explanationZh: 「小豬小豬，讓我進來！」大野狼假裝甜甜地叫。聽起來友善，但別被騙了！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the word to its meaning.
questions.explanationZh: brick=磚、knock=敲門、breath=呼吸、thick=厚——都是今晚的關鍵字！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He lifted heavy red blocks and mixed cold wet earth all day. The other two pigs laughed at him for working so slow.
questions.question: Why did the two brothers laugh at the third pig?
options: he was still working while they had finished
he dropped the bricks on his own feet
he was singing the wrong song too loudly
his house was painted a funny color
optionsZh: 他們已經蓋完，他還在努力
他把磚頭掉在自己腳上
他的房子被漆成奇怪的顏色
questions.explanationZh: 兩個哥哥早就蓋完了，第三隻小豬還在慢慢搬磚——所以他們覺得他「工作太慢」，就嘲笑他！
questions.sentenceZh: 他整天搬沉重的紅磚和泥土。另外兩隻小豬嘲笑他做得太慢。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His walls were tall. His walls were thick.
questions.questionEn: Were the brick walls stronger than the straw and stick houses?
questions.explanationZh: 既高又厚的磚牆，當然比稻草屋和木枝屋都更堅固——答案是 Yes！
questions.sentenceZh: 他的牆砌得又高又厚。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: That same night, the wolf came to the straw house with hungry eyes.
questions.question: What was the wolf planning to do?
questions.explanationZh: 大野狼肚子餓、眼神兇——他的計畫當然是「去抓小豬」！
questions.sentenceZh: 就在那天晚上，大野狼帶著飢餓的眼神走向草屋。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He _____ on the wooden door three times.
questions.question: Which word fits in the blank?
questions.explanationZh: 故事發生在過去，所以要用過去式——knock 的過去式是 knocked，就是「敲了」！
questions.sentenceZh: 大野狼敲了木門三下。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His knocks were loud, and his voice was soft like honey.
questions.question: Why did the wolf use a sweet voice while knocking hard?
options: to trick the pig into opening the door
because he was happy to visit the pig
he was tired and just wanted to sleep
the soft voice made his knocks lighter
optionsZh: 因為他很開心來拜訪小豬
輕柔的聲音讓他的敲門聲變小
questions.explanationZh: 大聲敲、假甜聲——這是大野狼的把戲，目的是「騙小豬開門」。壞蛋最愛裝好人！
questions.sentenceZh: 他的敲門聲很大，說話的聲音卻甜得像蜂蜜。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The first pig held his breath and did not know what to say.
questions.questionEn: Was the first pig confident when the wolf knocked?
questions.explanationZh: 屏住呼吸、不知道說什麼——這可不是有信心的樣子，他是嚇到了，答案是 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 第一隻小豬屏住呼吸，不知道該怎麼辦。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The first pig held his breath. He did not know what to say...
questions.explanationZh: 第一隻小豬嚇得「撲通」一跳——屏住呼吸，不知道該怎麼辦……你猜他會怎麼回答？

storyBeat: 草屋倒了 — 木屋擋得住嗎?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
這節的生字登場！
🔑 chin = 下巴
🔑 blow = 吹
🔑 fall = 倒
🔑 run = 跑
記牢這 4 個，等一下場面會很刺激！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Not by the hair on my chin!" the first pig cried.
questions.explanationZh: 「我下巴上的毛都不讓你進來！」第一隻小豬壯著膽子喊出去，聲音有點抖……這是英文故事裡一句很有名的拒絕台詞！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He told the wolf he would never open the door.
questions.question: What did the first pig say?
questions.explanationZh: never open the door——就是「堅決說不、絕對不開」！
questions.sentenceZh: 他告訴大野狼，他永遠不會開門。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The wolf smiled and his eyes grew bright.
questions.explanationZh: 大野狼嘴角上揚，眼睛突然亮起來——哦！這表情可不是好事……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His paws stretched, and he took a long deep breath.
questions.questionEn: Was the wolf about to leave?
questions.explanationZh: 伸出爪子、深吸一口氣——這明明是準備要吹！哪有要離開的樣子？答案是 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 大野狼伸出爪子，深深地吸了一口氣。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He huffed. He puffed. He blew with all his might.
questions.explanationZh: 「呼——！哈——！呼——！」大野狼吸足了氣，用盡全身力氣，拼命吹！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What did the wolf do?
questions.question: What did the wolf do?
questions.explanationZh: 「呼——！」大野狼用力吹氣——blew very hard！
questions.sentenceZh: 大野狼做了什麼？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The straw house flew apart in just a few seconds.
questions.explanationZh: 「嘩啦啦——！」草屋在幾秒鐘內就四散崩塌。稻草飛上天，小豬嚇得抱頭！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The first pig dashed away, with his short legs going fast.
questions.question: How did the first pig escape?
questions.explanationZh: dashed away 就是「拔腿狂奔」——他用最快的速度逃走，是「快腳跑」！
questions.sentenceZh: 第一隻小豬拔腿就跑，短短的腳跑得飛快。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He ran to the wood house and banged on the door.
questions.explanationZh: 第一隻小豬一路跑，「砰砰砰！」猛敲哥哥的木屋門。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the word to its meaning.
questions.explanationZh: chin=下巴、blow=吹、fall=倒、run=跑——這節的動詞都超重要！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He huffed. He puffed. He blew with all his might. The straw house flew apart in just a few seconds.
questions.question: What does this tell us about the straw house?
options: it was too weak to protect the pig
it was strong enough to hold for a while
the wolf needed many days to knock it down
the house was too big for the wolf to blow
optionsZh: 它太脆弱，根本保護不了小豬
它夠堅固，撐了一段時間
大野狼花了好幾天才吹倒它
房子太大，大野狼吹不倒
questions.explanationZh: 幾秒鐘就四散了——稻草屋「太脆弱，根本保護不了小豬」，媽媽的警告應驗了！
questions.sentenceZh: 大野狼吹啊吹，稻草屋在幾秒鐘內就四散崩塌。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The first pig dashed away, with his short legs going fast.
questions.questionEn: Did the first pig escape from the wolf?
questions.explanationZh: 他拔腿就跑——雖然緊張，但他成功逃走了，答案是 Yes！
questions.sentenceZh: 第一隻小豬拔腿就跑，短腿跑得飛快。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He ran to the wood house and banged on the door. The wolf is coming!
questions.question: How did the first pig feel when he ran?
questions.explanationZh: 拼命敲門、大喊「狼來了」——第一隻小豬是「嚇壞了」！terrified 就是這個感覺。
questions.sentenceZh: 他跑到木屋去拼命敲門，大野狼來了！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He told the wolf he would never open the door. But the wolf huffed and puffed and blew the straw house in.
questions.question: What can we learn from this?
options: saying no is not enough without a strong house
the wolf gives up if the pig shouts back hard
a straw house is fine if you lock the door tight
the wolf is too tired to blow very hard
optionsZh: 光說不行，要有一間堅固的家才行
只要大聲回嗆，大野狼就會放棄
草屋只要把門鎖好就沒問題
大野狼已經太累，吹不了太用力
questions.explanationZh: 小豬嘴上說不，但草屋還是倒了——這說明「光說不行，要有一間堅固的家才行」！
questions.sentenceZh: 他告訴大野狼永遠不開門。但大野狼呼呼一吹，草屋就倒了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match these actions to what happened.
questions.explanationZh: 大野狼吹、草屋倒、第一隻小豬逃跑——這是這一節的重點事件！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The wolf smiled and his eyes grew bright.
questions.questionEn: Did the wolf feel happy when the pig refused to open the door?
questions.explanationZh: 嘴角上揚、眼睛發亮——大野狼反而更興奮了，他覺得可以大顯身手，所以答案是 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 大野狼嘴角上揚，眼睛突然亮了起來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Let me in! Let me in!" he cried. "The wolf is coming!"
questions.explanationZh: 「讓我進！讓我進！大野狼來了！」他喘著氣大喊。木屋裡的哥哥……你聽到了嗎？

storyBeat: 木屋倒了 — 磚屋是希望

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
這節重要生字登場！
🔑 lock = 鎖
🔑 roof = 屋頂
🔑 back = 後面
🔑 hope = 希望
記住了嗎？往下繼續看故事！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The two pigs locked the wood door tight.
questions.explanationZh: 兩隻小豬把木門「喀嗒」一聲牢牢鎖好——但鎖得住大野狼嗎？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They saw the wolf step up the path with hungry eyes.
questions.question: How did the wolf look as he came?
questions.explanationZh: 眼神飢餓——hungry eyes，大野狼是「又餓又準備好了」要行動！
questions.sentenceZh: 他們看見大野狼一步一步走上來，眼神飢餓。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The wolf knocked even harder this time.
questions.explanationZh: 這次大野狼敲得更用力了——「咚！咚！咚！」木屋都在抖。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His knock shook the wood walls and rattled the windows.
questions.questionEn: Were the wood walls fully safe?
questions.explanationZh: 敲一下牆就抖、窗戶就響——這木屋哪裡「完全安全」了？答案是 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 他的拳頭一敲，木牆就震動，窗戶咯咯響。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Not by the hair on our chins!" they both cried.
questions.explanationZh: 「我們下巴上的毛都不！」兩兄弟齊聲大喊。聲音更大了，但心裡……是不是有點怕呢？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The wolf huffed and puffed and blew the wood house in.
questions.explanationZh: 「呼——！哈——！呼——！」大野狼拼命吹，木屋「嘩——」一聲就倒了！木枝四散飛開！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What happened to the wood house?
questions.question: What happened?
questions.explanationZh: 大野狼一吹，木牆就「轟！」地倒下來了！
questions.sentenceZh: 木屋發生了什麼事？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Both brothers ran out the back, fast as they could.
questions.question: How did the pigs leave?
questions.explanationZh: out the back——從後面跑出去，而且跑得超快！
questions.sentenceZh: 兩兄弟從後門衝出去，能跑多快就多快。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They raced to the brick house with their hearts pounding.
questions.explanationZh: 兩兄弟「撲通撲通」心跳個不停，拼命往第三隻小豬的磚屋跑去——只剩最後一個希望了！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the word to its meaning.
questions.explanationZh: lock=鎖、roof=屋頂、hope=希望、back=後面——把這幾個記牢！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His knock shook the wood walls and rattled the windows. The wolf huffed and puffed and blew the wood house in.
questions.question: What happened to the two pigs' plan to stay safe?
options: wood house failed just like the straw one
locked door kept the wolf out for good
two brothers pushed the wolf away together
wood walls held up and protected everyone
optionsZh: 鎖好的門永遠擋住了大野狼
兩兄弟合力把大野狼推走了
木牆撐住了，保護了所有人
questions.explanationZh: 一吹木屋就倒——木屋的命運跟草屋一樣，「木屋跟草屋一樣倒了」！
questions.sentenceZh: 大野狼的拳頭把木牆震動，大野狼吹啊吹，木屋就倒了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They raced to the brick house with their hearts pounding.
questions.questionEn: Were the two brothers calm when they ran to the brick house?
questions.explanationZh: 心臟砰砰跳、拼命跑——根本不平靜！他們嚇壞了，所以答案是 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 兩兄弟心跳猛烈，拼命往磚屋跑去。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The third pig opened the door just in time. Just in time.
questions.question: How did the two brothers feel when the door opened?
questions.explanationZh: 剛好趕上！那種感覺就是「鬆了一口氣」——relieved，總算逃過一劫。
questions.sentenceZh: 第三隻小豬剛好及時打開了門。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Both brothers ran out the back, fast as they could. They raced to the brick house.
questions.question: What was now the only safe place left?
options: the deep forest behind the field
a tall tree by the road
questions.explanationZh: 兩兄弟拼命跑向磚屋——那裡是「唯一剩下的安全地方」，只剩第三隻小豬的磚屋了！
questions.sentenceZh: 兩兄弟從後面衝出去，拼命跑向磚屋。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match these story events in order.
questions.explanationZh: 兩隻豬鎖門、大野狼吹得更用力、木屋倒了、磚屋門及時打開——這節的順序！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The wolf knocked even harder this time.
questions.questionEn: Was the wolf getting weaker each time he attacked?
questions.explanationZh: 這次敲得「更用力」——他不是越來越弱，反而越來越猛，答案是 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 大野狼這次敲得更用力了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The third pig opened the door just in time. Just in time...
questions.explanationZh: 「砰砰砰！」第三隻小豬及時把門打開——兄弟倆衝了進去。好險，好險……

storyBeat: 磚屋擋住狼 — 但狼還在外面

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
最後一節的生字！
🔑 climb = 爬
🔑 fire = 火
🔑 smoke = 煙
🔑 safe = 安全
記住這 4 個，故事要到最精彩的地方了！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The wolf came to the brick house and knocked.
questions.explanationZh: 大野狼走到磚屋前，舉起爪子——「咚！咚！咚！」這次，磚屋一動也不動。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: All three brothers shouted the same answer back at him.
questions.question: What did the three pigs say?
questions.explanationZh: 三兄弟齊聲大喊：「我們下巴上的毛都不讓你進來！」——not by our chin hair！
questions.sentenceZh: 三兄弟一起對他大喊同一個答案。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The wolf huffed. He puffed. He blew, and blew, and blew.
questions.explanationZh: 「呼——！哈——！呼——！」大野狼吹了又吹，吹了再吹，嘴巴都快噴火了……磚屋，動了嗎？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But the brick walls stood still and did not move at all.
questions.questionEn: Did the brick walls fall down?
questions.explanationZh: stood still，紋絲不動！磚牆根本沒倒，答案是 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 可是磚牆紋絲不動，一點都沒有搖。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The wolf tried to climb the roof to get in.
questions.explanationZh: 大野狼吹不倒，就換個辦法——他開始往屋頂爬，想從上面鑽進去！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The third pig built a hot fire inside a big pot.
questions.question: What did the third pig do?
questions.explanationZh: 他在大鍋裡生火——made a hot fire，這是他的聰明計謀！
questions.sentenceZh: 第三隻小豬在屋裡一口大鍋裡，生起了熊熊的火。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What did the wolf see from the roof?
questions.question: What did the wolf see?
questions.explanationZh: 從屋頂往下一看——「咦！煙！好燙！」大野狼嚇到了！
questions.sentenceZh: 大野狼從屋頂上看到了什麼？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The wolf jumped down from the roof and ran fast to the trees.
questions.question: What did the wolf finally do?
questions.explanationZh: 跳下屋頂、拼命逃跑——大野狼放棄，落荒而逃！
questions.sentenceZh: 大野狼從屋頂跳下來，拼命跑回樹林裡。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The three brothers sat warm and safe inside the brick house.
questions.explanationZh: 三兄弟坐在暖呼呼的磚屋裡，擠在一起，終於安全了。以後要聽媽媽的話了吧！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the word to its meaning.
questions.explanationZh: climb=爬、fire=火、smoke=煙、safe=安全——這節結局的關鍵詞！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But the brick walls stood still and did not move at all. The wolf tried to climb the roof to get in.
questions.question: Why did the wolf try the roof?
options: the walls would not fall so he tried another way
he could see smoke and wanted to warm himself
a window on the roof was open for him
the third pig invited him to come up
optionsZh: 牆吹不倒，他想另外找辦法
屋頂上有一扇開著的窗
第三隻小豬邀請他上去
questions.explanationZh: 吹了又吹，磚牆紋絲不動——大野狼沒辦法，只好爬屋頂試試，「牆吹不倒，他想另外找辦法」！
questions.sentenceZh: 磚牆紋絲不動。大野狼試著爬上屋頂鑽進去。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The third pig built a hot fire inside a big pot.
questions.questionEn: Was the fire the third pig's way to stop the wolf?
questions.explanationZh: 在大鍋裡生火——這就是第三隻小豬的聰明計謀，用火嚇走大野狼，所以答案是 Yes！
questions.sentenceZh: 第三隻小豬在一口大鍋裡，生起了熊熊的火。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The wolf jumped down from the roof and ran fast to the trees.
questions.question: How did the wolf feel when he ran away?
questions.explanationZh: 看到熱騰騰的煙，大野狼跳下屋頂就跑——他「嚇到了」，scared 就是這個感覺！
questions.sentenceZh: 大野狼從屋頂跳下來，拼命往樹林裡跑。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The three brothers sat warm and safe inside the brick house. But the wolf is still out there.
questions.question: What is the lesson of this story?
options: working hard and building well keeps you safe
being the fastest builder wins every time
you should always shout to scare away wolves
fire is the only way to stop a big bad wolf
optionsZh: 認真建造才能保護自己
蓋得最快就能每次獲勝
只有火才能阻止大野狼
questions.explanationZh: 草屋、木屋都倒了，只有磚屋撐住——故事的道理就是「認真建造才能保護自己」！
questions.sentenceZh: 三兄弟坐在溫暖又安全的磚屋裡。但大野狼還在外面。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match these story moments.
questions.explanationZh: 磚牆不動、大野狼爬上去、第三隻小豬生火、大野狼逃跑——這節的四大重點！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The three brothers sat warm and safe inside the brick house.
questions.questionEn: Did the third pig's hard work help all three brothers?
questions.explanationZh: 三兄弟都在磚屋裡，安全又溫暖——第三隻小豬的努力救了所有人，所以答案是 Yes！
questions.sentenceZh: 三兄弟坐在磚屋裡，又暖和又安全。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But the wolf is still out there, watching from the deep dark woods...
questions.explanationZh: 不過……大野狼還在外面的深深黑森林裡，靜靜地盯著這裡看……故事，真的結束了嗎？
